title: rubus rosiflorus var. eriocarpus
intro: Rubus rosiflorus var. eriocarpus, also known as the Eriocarpus rose-flowered bramble or Japanese rose raspberry, is a type of shrub native to East Asia, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus rosiflorus var. eriocarpus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine in East Asia.
